parts.text: make me a protein that looks like a donut

I can certainly help you design a donut-shaped protein! For this, I would propose a cyclic symmetry (such as C6 or C7) to form a stable, ring-like oligomer, utilizing a beta-barrel topology to create the central pore.

This design would likely be around 250–350 residues in total, balancing structural stability with an open, accessible center. Does this topology and symmetry sound appropriate for your needs, or would you like to adjust the size or target a specific diameter for the hole?
